title.en: The power of the first thunder tribulation is t...

content.en:
Rumble!!!

The first thunder tribulation descended and directly bombarded Ye Tian's body, but it did not cause the slightest damage to Ye Tian, and he couldn't even make Ye Tian tremble.

The power of the first thunder tribulation is too weak!

But this weakness is only for Ye Tian, for others, the first thunder tribulation is already very powerful.

"The power of the first Thunder Tribulation is enough to rival the full force of the Third Order Heavenly Venerable!"

The First Divine Lord was surprised.

Such an attack may not be a big deal, but this is only the first thunder tribulation!

Moreover, if an ordinary master breaks through to the realm of Tianzun, his combat power is only a fifth-rank Tianzun or a fourth-rank Tianzun at most, and he can't even withstand the first thunder tribulation.

And the thunder tribulation in the Tianzun realm can have 24 thunder tribulations!

In this way, it can be imagined how terrifying the 24th Thunder Tribulation is, and even ordinary supremes may not be able to withstand it.

The second thunderstorm!

The third thunder tribulation!

The Fourth Thunder Tribulation!

......

One thunder tribulation after another bombarded down, but Ye Tian did not move, he kept cultivating there, as if these thunder tribulations were just tickling for him.

The Nineteenth Thunderstorm has struck.

This time it was a humanoid thunder tribulation, which bombarded Ye Tian with supreme combat power, but what shocked many powerhouses of the Protoss was that the power of this kind of powerful blow comparable to the full force of the fifth-rank supreme could not pose the slightest threat to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian still didn't move, and the full force of the humanoid Thunder Tribulation directly collapsed on Ye Tian's body.

"What kind of flesh is this?"

The Protoss Supremes were dumbfounded, and even the First Divine Lord was extremely shocked.

If he was in Ye Tian's situation, he could only use his divine power to protect his body, but Ye Tian did not use his divine power at all, and only used his pure physical strength to destroy the full force of the fifth-rank supreme.

Such a body is terrible!

"Is the body of the Rebel really so terrible?"

The First Divine Lord wondered.

But he had also seen the sons of those eras in the twelve universe eras, some of whom were also anti-heaven, but they definitely did not have such a terrifying body as Ye Tian, and even in ancient records, there had never been such a terrifying body.

This is absolutely not normal!

The twentieth thunder tribulation also came, but there was still no way to help Ye Tian, and after an attack, it collapsed.

Soon, the twenty-first thunderstorm also came.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes and stood up.

The reason why he used his physical strength to fight against the Thunder Tribulation was just to let the people of the Protoss know how powerful he was and warn the Protoss.

Now that the effect of the warning has been achieved, there is naturally no need for him to fully display the power of his physical body.

In the face of the twenty-first thunder tribulation, Ye Tian made a move, and smashed the twenty-first thunder tribulation with one hand.

Soon, the twenty-second thunder tribulation appeared.

This time, it was not a humanoid thunderstorm, but a beast-shaped thunderstorm.

Rumble!!!

The huge Qilin Thunder Tribulation descended, as if it was about to swallow Ye Tian all at once.

"The power of this Thunder Tribulation has risen to the top fifth-rank supreme level, according to this area, the last thunder tribulation should be equivalent to the full force of the fourth-rank supreme, not to mention that I have stepped into the realm of Tianzun, even if I am still in the dominating realm, I can take this thunder tribulation. It seems that the Thunder Tribulation can't threaten me at all now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian replaced the knife with his hand, and split the Qilin Thunder Tribulation with one sword.

The twenty-third Thunder Tribulation was the Phoenix Thunder Tribulation, and the Phoenix Thunder Tribulation that covered the void descended with terrifying might.

At this time, some of the nearby Lords and Heavenly Venerables all flew into the distance, and they didn't dare to approach at all, otherwise the power alone would not be something they could bear!

Next to the First Divine Lord, a fifth-rank supreme said: "The Heavenly Venerable Tribulation of the Rebel is so terrifying, it's terrifying, the power of such a thunder tribulation is enough to completely hit me!"

But such a powerful Phoenix Thunder Tribulation was still slashed by Ye Tian and completely dissipated.

The last thunderstorm soon came.

As Ye Tian guessed, this thunder tribulation had reached the level of a fourth-rank supreme, and it was descending with the power of a dragon-shaped thunder tribulation.

It overlooks Ye Tian like an ancient ancestral dragon.

Ye Tian looked at this Thunder Tribulation Dragon and said, "You are too weak, get out!"

A single sword broke through the air, not only slashing the Thunder Tribulation Dragon, but also piercing through the endless thunderclouds.

The Tianzun Tribulation dispersed, and Ye Tiancai really stepped into the realm of Tianzun, and if he was divided by combat power, he was the real Supreme.

"Supreme, the pinnacle of the universe, the next step is transcendence! It's a pity that I don't even have a clue about detachment now!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Swish!

He teleported in front of the First Divine Lord: "First Divine Lord, I have become the Supreme, so I will not stay here!"

"Wanfa Supreme, if you have time, you can come to the Protoss at any time to sit!"

The First God Lord said politely.

"Definitely!"

Ye Tian smiled and immediately turned around and left.

Wait for Ye Tian to leave the God Realm and leave the Divine Clan's territory.

A supreme asked the First Divine Master, "First Divine Master, what level of supreme strength has this Ten Thousand Laws Supreme reached now?"

The First Divine Lord frowned and said, "At the very least, it is also a second-class supreme, as for the first-class supreme, it shouldn't have entered yet." The strongest person in the universe is the first-class supreme, and he has only broken through. However, after breaking through to the realm of Heavenly Venerable, divine power can still be accumulated, and the body and soul of the anti-heaven can continue to cultivate. The limit of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme is still very early, and his strength can increase significantly, it shouldn't be long before he can reach the first-class Supreme combat power!"

"First Class Supreme!"

The expressions of all the Protoss people changed drastically.

The strongest of their god clan is the first god master, and now he is only in the ranks of second-class supremes, and he can't even dominate in the ranks of second-class supremes.

If the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws stepped into the ranks of the first-class supreme, wouldn't it surpass the First God Lord, and wouldn't the human race surpass the God Race in the future?

"We can't stop the rise of the human race, but I have reached a contract with the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws, if our Protoss encounters a great disaster in the future, the Supreme Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws will help us once. In addition, the Terrans will not deal with the Protoss, which is also part of the contract. Just by letting the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme enter the Chaos Courtyard once, he obtained such benefits, and such a deal is very worthwhile!"

The first god is the main way.

If he knew that Ye Tian had condensed a half-step chaotic life body in the Chaos Courtyard to have such a terrifying body, I don't know if he would regret it.

---------

After Ye Tian became the Supreme, he quickly returned to the human race.

Now, he no longer fears any supreme beings, so he doesn't care about it in the slightest.

But for now, he was curious to know what the limit of his combat power was.

It's a pity that the Mixed Yuan Pagoda of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain can't completely test the limit of his combat power, after all, the Mixed Yuan Pagoda is just a supreme treasure, and it has not constructed too strong supreme at all.

Now, the only ones who could test the limit of his strength were the first-class supremes of the Lord of the Yuan Gu.
